      }
    }
  },

  "sceneNumber": 3,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "REPORTER\nWe go live in ten.\n\nOverhead angle: producer rushes in, hands gripping a printed page with tactile urgency, shallow depth of field on paper texture and bold headline. Dynamic handheld follows the exchange, punchy direct flash highlighting the moment.",

    "location": "INT. SLEEK NEWSROOM - NIGHT",

  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Dynamic overhead angle in modern social-first editorial style captures the start of the moment inside a sleek newsroom at night. REPORTER sits at an airy white desk wearing a crisp button-up blouse in neutral tones. PRODUCER rushes forward gripping a printed page with intense tactile urgency wearing a sleeve featuring a bold #D4536D accent color over a neutral shirt. Shallow depth of field emphasizes the creased texture of the paper as the producer’s hands deliver it toward the desk in mid-motion, body angled and muscles tensed with forward momentum while the reporter’s posture shows calm attention. Large rain-streaked windows frame the background against minimalist white surfaces and soft glowing terminals. Bright natural window light mixed with warm golden accents fills the room while a punchy direct flash creates crisp highlights and immediate contrast on the hands and paper. Slight handheld energy keeps the frame alive yet stable, high-key airy atmosphere with neutral whites, soft beiges and one accent pop of color against crisp clean surfaces.",
      "negativePrompt": "Blurry faces, extra limbs, distorted hands, heavy diffusion, floating screens, holograms, text overlays, cluttered background, dark moody lighting, low contrast",

        "environment": "Airy modern newsroom at night with white desks, rain-streaked windows, minimal flat surfaces and soft terminal glows",
        "lighting": "Bright natural window light with golden accents and punchy direct flash creating crisp highlights and immediate contrast",
        "camera": "Overhead angle with shallow depth of field and slight handheld energy",
        "composition": "Centered action on hands and paper delivery with reporter positioned calmly at desk edge",
        "style": "Modern editorial product photography with tactile real-life energy and clean social-first aesthetic",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, high resolution, sharp focus on paper texture with natural bokeh background",
        "atmosphere": "Energetic focused newsroom under deadline pressure, airy high-key mood with fresh sensory immediacy"
      }
    }
  },

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>
